finding: Perceiving choice alternatives as integrated wholes shifts preference strategy from attribute-by-attribute comparison to holistic evaluation, causing preference to favor items with superior aggregate rating over items exceeding on multiple individual dimensions.
Quantified determiners in object position facilitate downstream ellipsis resolution during real-time parsing, indicating integration of two syntactic operations through shared processing mechanism.
Partisan supporters knowingly report objectively false information on surveys, especially when politically engaged, demonstrating intentional expressive responding rather than genuine belief.

Expectations about outcome probability establish reference points for valuation; higher expected ownership increases item valuation by 20-30% relative to low-expectation conditions, independent of current status.

Individuals exhibit heightened risk-taking specifically when positioned at bottom of distribution, choosing gambles for rank escape that would be rejected from higher positions, contradicting standard risk-aversion patterns.

Difference between implied and realized variance predicts quarterly stock returns explaining 15% of variation, dominating traditional predictors; combined with price-earnings ratio achieves 26% explanatory power.
